scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 4 legacy-parity read streams only (projects, sections, tasks, comments). Todoist's write endpoints (create/update/close/reopen/delete project, section, task, comment) are out of scope for this migration (legacy itself ships no writes; capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented project creation; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented task creation; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented task mutation; Pass B capability expansion
destructive delete not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
